---
name: Parser Failure
about: Report a PDF parsing error or OCR mistake
title: '[PARSER] '
labels: ['parser', 'bug', 'beta-feedback']
assignees: ''
---

**Parser Job Information**
- PDF Used (if public): [Link or Name]
- Parser Job ID (from UI): 
- Did the parser use OCR? [Yes/No/Unsure]
- Parser Confidence Score: 

**What went wrong?**
- [ ] Incorrect Questions
- [ ] Incorrect Options
- [ ] Missing Images
- [ ] Formula Issues
- [ ] Table Issues
- [ ] Diagram Issues

**Detailed Description**
Explain exactly what part of the PDF was parsed incorrectly. Provide the original text vs the parsed text.

**Screenshots**
Attach a screenshot of the original PDF question and a screenshot of the Review Dashboard output.
